entries.definition: yourselves would not take it [if you were buying it] without having its price brought down.
entries.definition_english: yourselves would not take it [if you were buying it] without having its price brought down.

entries.definition:
gh–m–m to cover, to conceal; clouds; obscurity, to be incomprehensible, to mumble; anxiety, distress. Of this root, three forms occur 11 times in the Qurʾan: غَمّ ghamm six times; غُمَّة ghummatun once and غَمَام ghamām three times.
غَمّ ghamm [n.] distress, anguish, sadness, grief (3:153) فَأَثَابَكُمْ غَمًّا بِغَمٍّ and He recompensed you with sorrow upon sorrow [also interpreted as: He rewarded you with grief upon grief].

غُمَّة ghummatun [n.] obscurity, source of ambiguity (10:71) لَا يَكُنْ أَمْرُكُمْ عَلَيْكُمْ غُمَّةً do not let your affair [course of action] be something obscure for you.

غَمَام ghamām [coll. n.] thick clouds (2:57) وَظَلَّلْنَا عَلَيْكُمُ الْغَمَامَ We caused the clouds to shade you.
entries.definition_english:
gh–m–m to cover, to conceal; clouds; obscurity, to be incomprehensible, to mumble; anxiety, distress. Of this root, three forms occur 11 times in the Qurʾan: غَمّ ghamm six times; غُمَّة ghummatun once and غَمَام ghamām three times.
غَمّ ghamm [n.] distress, anguish, sadness, grief (3:153) فَأَثَابَكُمْ غَمًّا بِغَمٍّ and He recompensed you with sorrow upon sorrow [also interpreted as: He rewarded you with grief upon grief].

غُمَّة ghummatun [n.] obscurity, source of ambiguity (10:71) لَا يَكُنْ أَمْرُكُمْ عَلَيْكُمْ غُمَّةً do not let your affair [course of action] be something obscure for you.

غَمَام ghamām [coll. n.] thick clouds (2:57) وَظَلَّلْنَا عَلَيْكُمُ الْغَمَامَ We caused the clouds to shade you.
